what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links an artifact to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It has an id 'att-c5a07fe6' and an added timestamp.
standouts: Target uses a 'board://' URI scheme pointing to item-e5cdd226.
File is essentially an empty reference record.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Stored as a markdown file under channel-memory/channel_attachments/.
Uses a URI-style identifier for the target board item.
concerns: No body or description explains what is being attached.
The target board item is referenced but not described in this file.
No author or provenance beyond a timestamp is recorded.
notes: A sparse board-item attachment record in dragnet-development that points to board item item-e5cdd226 without any explanatory content.
questions: What channel message or artifact does this attachment originate from?
What does board item item-e5cdd226 represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: The metadata declares a board_items attachment, and the file contains exactly that declaration; purpose and actual align, though the declaration is minimal.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference traceability between channels and boards.
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a link between a dragnet-development channel artifact and a specific board item for later retrieval or traceability.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item within an otherwise empty attachment file.
contribution: Contributes a cross-reference record that maps attachment id att-c5a07fe6 to board item item-e5cdd226, preserving a channel-to-board linkage in the ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file of type board_items linking dragnet-development attachment att-c5a07fe6 to board item item-e5cdd226 with no body content.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record a persistent attachment-to-board-item reference for dragnet-development.
